headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 7 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 7 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 2 critical, 19 high, 7 medium, 11 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Chişinău (RMO/LUKK); plus 18 other bases. 7 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, mist and low cloud base  — most notably around Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Suceava Stefan cel Mare (SCV/LRSV) and Varna (VAR/LBWN). Network hotspots: Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN), Leoš Janáček Airport Ostrava (OSR/LKMT), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Suceava Stefan cel Mare (SCV/LRSV) and 2 others. Primary drivers: cold‑temperature performance penalties, low cloud base and mist. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 5 airports changed status, led by Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Beauvais Tillé (BVA/LFOB), Paris-Orly (ORY/LFPO) and 2 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 7 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — HIGH: mist; cloud base around 300 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; cloud base around 600 ft | Timişoara Traian Vuia (TSR/LRTR) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 200 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — HIGH: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — HIGH: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; strong gusts risk and 15 others. Worst affected now: Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Leoš Janáček Airport Ostrava (OSR/LKMT) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Craiova (CRA/LRCV) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 250 m, RVR down to 500 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Suceava Stefan cel Mare (SCV/LRSV) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Poprad-Tatry (TAT/LZTT) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; cloud base around 200 ft (drivers: approach minima limits, cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings) and 1 others. Changed since last run: Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Beauvais Tillé (BVA/LFOB), Paris-Orly (ORY/LFPO), Tirana International Airport Mother Teresa (TIA/LATI), Skopje (SKP/LWSK).
